postToolUse.bash: python3 -c "import sys,json,os;d=json.load(sys.stdin);tn=d.get('toolName','');fp=(d.get('toolArgs') or {}).get('file_path','') if tn in ('Edit','Write') else '';print(json.dumps({'additionalContext':'Tip: run /test-connector to verify your connector changes.'})) if fp and os.path.basename(fp) in ('connector.py','configuration.json','requirements.txt') else None"
postToolUse.powershell: python -c "import sys,json,os;d=json.load(sys.stdin);tn=d.get('toolName','');fp=(d.get('toolArgs') or {}).get('file_path','') if tn in ('Edit','Write') else '';print(json.dumps({'additionalContext':'Tip: run /test-connector to verify your connector changes.'})) if fp and os.path.basename(fp) in ('connector.py','configuration.json','requirements.txt') else None"
